title: Fish Scale Texture Blue Car Head Rest Covers, Novelty Print, Universal Decorative Covers, 2 Pack Headrest Covers
features: High-Quality Material: Our car headrest cover is made of high-quality elastic fabric, which is soft and comfortable to the touch, elastic, can stretch and fit your car headrest
Universal Size: The car headrest cover measures 11 x 10.6 inches with elastic bottom and straps, fits all regular sized car headrests

Protect seats: The excellent breathability of the sedan headrest cover protects it from daily wear and tear of daily life, hair grease, and plays a good protective role for the original leather of the car.
Convenient To Use: The car headrest cover is designed with elastic opening, just put it directly on the headrest
Perfect Gift: It can be used as a perfect wedding gift, christmas gift, anniversary gift, etc
description: Get a car headrest cover for your car seat to hide existing wear and tear, make your car look new again, and protect it from further damage
